positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a majestic, leaping golden retriever silhouette against a warm, gradient sunset background. The dog is captured mid-air, displaying powerful, graceful motion. The artwork should use clean, bold lines and flat areas of color, emphasizing high contrast between the black silhouette and the vibrant background. The color palette is limited to deep indigo, burnt orange, gold, and soft cream, giving it an ethereal, joyful, yet sophisticated aesthetic. Perfect for screen printing on apparel. Centrally composed, vector art style, highly detailed yet simple enough for print.
negative: text, logo, watermark, blurry, bad anatomy, low resolution, extra limbs, noise, grain, photographic, realistic photo, poor contrast, messy, busy, complex background, signature
